nf:register.nf:name: debug_ctrl
nf:register.nf:description: Write bit0 rising edge to clear debug counters and snapshots

nf:register.nf:name: hw_offload_match_count
nf:register.nf:description: Number of packets classified as offload

nf:register.nf:name: hw_last_udp_dst_port
nf:register.nf:description: Lower 16 bits contain the last observed UDP destination port

nf:register.nf:name: hw_last_payload_magic
nf:register.nf:description: Lower 16 bits contain the last observed payload magic

nf:register.nf:name: hw_last_header_word5_hi
nf:register.nf:description: Upper 32 bits of captured header word 5

nf:register.nf:name: hw_last_header_word5_lo
nf:register.nf:description: Lower 32 bits of captured header word 5

nf:register.nf:name: hw_last_header_word6_hi
nf:register.nf:description: Upper 32 bits of captured header word 6

nf:register.nf:name: hw_last_header_word6_lo
nf:register.nf:description: Lower 32 bits of captured header word 6

nf:register.nf:name: hw_last_rewrite_word_hi
nf:register.nf:description: Upper 32 bits of the last emitted rewritten word

nf:register.nf:name: hw_last_rewrite_word_lo
nf:register.nf:description: Lower 32 bits of the last emitted rewritten word
